ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "first_nm" TEXT /* First name of the donor */,
  "last_nm" TEXT /* Last name of the donor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the donor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the donor */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the donor */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the donor */,
  "employ_address" TEXT /* Address of the donor's employer */,
  "employ_city" TEXT /* City of the donor's employer */,
  "employ_state" TEXT /* State of the donor's employer */,
  "employ_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the donor's employer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the donor */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the donor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the donor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who made the contribution */,
  "tran_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., credit/debit card, check, cash) */,
  "contb_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "contb_amt" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "receipt_dt" TEXT /* Date the contribution was received */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week the contribution was received */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the contribution was received */,
  "contribution_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the contribution */,
  "contribution_method" TEXT /* Detailed method of contribution */,
  "contribution_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the contribution */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the contribution is anonymous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contribution was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contribution record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution limit */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor subject to the contribution limit */,
  "limit_amt" REAL /* Amount of the contribution limit */,
  "limit_period" TEXT /* Period during which the contribution limit applies (e.g., election cycle, calendar year) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the contribution limit is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contribution limit was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contribution limit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_limits_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recurring_donors" (
  "recurring_donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recurring donor */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who is a recurring donor */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the recurring donations (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the recurring donations started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the recurring donations ended (if applicable) */,
  "recurring_amount" REAL /* Amount of the recurring donation */,
  "next_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled donation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recurring donation (e.g., active, paused, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the recurring donor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the recurring donor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recurring_donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recurring_donors_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_contributors" (
  "major_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major contributor */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who is a major contributor */,
  "total_amt" REAL /* Total amount contributed by the donor */,
  "avg_amt" REAL /* Average amount contributed by the donor per contribution */,
  "last_contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the last major contribution */,
  "total_contributions" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions made by the major contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the major contributor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the major contributor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_major_contributors_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, donor, contribution) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, campaign manager, donor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
